raw_dump: Okay, Natalia's provider corner spreadsheet — people keep asking her the same handful of questions over and over, like who's taking new Medicaid patients and whose panel is closed. And I think some of the credentialing is about to lapse for a few people but I'm honestly not sure who. I need to figure out what to actually DO with this spreadsheet so it stops living in her head. Maybe make it a reference thing in Throughline? And there's probably an action in here about the credentialing.

file_refs.note: The spreadsheet the dump is about. Lives in the shared OneDrive Provider Corner folder.

containers.title: Provider Roster
